hero.title: The jersey you want, made to order and shipped worldwide.
hero.description: Shop club & national-team jerseys plus exclusive concept designs. Pick your size, add name & number (free), and we’ll ship your order with tracking from start to finish.

customers.title: Real photos. Real feedback.
customers.text1: Want to be featured? Send your review + photo via Instagram DM at
customers.review1: Amazing quality and the stitching is on point. Tracking updates were clear and I’ll definitely order again.
customers.review2: Great value for the price. Delivery took a bit longer than expected, but the jersey exceeded my expectations.

collections.title: Shop by collection
collections.subtitle: Start with a category — then pick your favorite design.

curated.title: Best picks across every style
curated.subtitle: Scroll, click, and explore. Every product includes tracked shipping and secure checkout.
curated.saveNote: Save up to 70% vs official prices

howSection.title: How it works
howSection.subtitle: Simple, fast, and tracked from start to finish.

choose.title: Choose your jersey
choose.text: Pick a club or national-team kit (or an exclusive concept).

options.title: Select size & options
options.text: Choose your size and add name & number if you want.

made.title: Made to order
made.text: Your item is produced on demand with great detail.

delivery.title: Tracked delivery
delivery.text: Worldwide delivery in 7–20 business days with tracking.

cta.title: Choose your next jersey with confidence
cta.subtitle: Secure checkout, tracked shipping, and fan-favorite designs — all in one place.

checkout.title: Secure checkout
checkout.text: Visa, Mastercard, AmEx, PayPal, Amazon Pay, Multibanco (PT), Revolut Pay, Klarna, Satispay, Link — all processed securely via Stripe.

support.title: Fast support
support.text: Support in English via email and Instagram.

shipping.a: Delivery takes 7–20 business days. You’ll get a tracking code for every order.

personalization.q: Can I add name and number?
personalization.a: Yes — you can personalize most jerseys with name and number.

payments.a: Visa, Mastercard, AmEx, PayPal, Amazon Pay, Multibanco (PT), Revolut Pay, Klarna, Satispay, and MB Way (via Stripe).

tracking.q: How can I track my order?
tracking.a: After your order is shipped you’ll receive an email with your tracking code and a tracking link.

countries.q: Which countries do you ship to?
countries.a: We ship worldwide. Delivery times vary by destination.

size.q: How do I pick the right size?
size.a: Check the Size Guide page for measurements and fit tips.

metadata.title: Terms of Service — FootballWorld
metadata.description: FootballWorld Terms of Service: ordering, pricing, shipping, returns, personalizations, payments, promotions, intellectual property, acceptable use, liability, law, and contact.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: These Terms govern your use of FootballWorld and any purchases you make here. By using our site, you agree to these Terms. For how we collect and handle your data, see our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

intro.label: Introduction
intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: These Terms (“Terms”) apply to the FootballWorld website and to orders placed through it. If you do not agree, do not use the site. Where mandatory consumer laws provide additional protections in your country, those protections prevail.
intro.callout: Tip: keep your order-confirmation email — it includes your order number and helpful links.

account.label: Eligibility & Account
account.title: Eligibility & Account
items: You must have legal capacity to contract in your jurisdiction.
You are responsible for activity under your account and for keeping credentials secure.
We may suspend/terminate accounts for fraud, abuse, or violation of these Terms.

ordering.label: Ordering Process
ordering.title: Ordering Process
items: You will receive an email confirming your order. The contract is formed when we send a dispatch/shipping confirmation.
We reserve the right to refuse/cancel due to inventory, suspected fraud, or pricing error (you will be refunded).
Double-check customizations; items are produced exactly as entered.

pricing.label: Pricing & Taxes
pricing.title: Pricing & Taxes
items: Prices are usually in EUR unless otherwise shown.
Taxes, duties, and import fees may be collected by the carrier at destination depending on your country.
Obvious pricing mistakes may be corrected; we’ll contact you before processing.

shipping.label: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.body: Production and transit times are estimates and can vary by carrier and customs. For a detailed guide and live tracking tips, see <shipping>Shipping & Tracking</shipping>.

custom.label: Custom Products
custom.title: Custom Products
items: Personalized items (e.g., name/number) are made to order and are not returnable unless defective.
Please verify spelling, number, and size before checkout.
custom.callout: Before customizing, check our <sizeGuide>Size Guide</sizeGuide> to make sure the fit is perfect.

returns.label: Returns & Refunds
returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.body: Eligible items can be returned according to our <returns>Returns & Exchanges</returns> policy. Items must be new, unused, and with tags. Personalized items: only if defective or damaged.

cancel.label: Cancellations & Changes
cancel.title: Cancellations & Changes
items: We process orders quickly — contact us immediately for changes/cancellations.
Orders already in production or shipped cannot be changed/cancelled. Personalized items typically enter production shortly after purchase.

product.label: Product Info & Sizing
product.title: Product Information & Sizing
product.body: Colors may vary slightly due to display settings. For measurements and fit, see the <sizeGuide>Size Guide</sizeGuide>.

payments.label: Payments & Security
payments.title: Payments & Security
items: Payments are handled by trusted processors (e.g., Stripe, PayPal, Amazon Pay). We do not store full card numbers.
We may run antifraud checks to protect customers and the store.
payments.callout: Payment data is processed securely by those providers. Review their privacy and security policies as well.

promos.label: Promotions
promos.title: Promotions & Discount Codes
items: Codes must be applied at checkout and cannot be applied retroactively.
Promotions can be modified or withdrawn at any time.

ip.label: Intellectual Property
ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.body: All content (images, text, graphics, and designs) is owned/licensed by FootballWorld and protected by law. Use without prior permission is prohibited.

acceptable.label: Acceptable Use
acceptable.title: Acceptable Use
items: Do not engage in unlawful, fraudulent, infringing, or harmful activities.
Do not interfere with security, site operation, or the experience of other users.
No automated scraping or reuse of content without permission.

third.label: Third-Party Links
third.title: Third-Party Links
third.body: We may reference third-party sites. We are not responsible for their content, policies, or practices — access at your own risk and review their terms and privacy notices.

warranty.label: Warranties & Liability
warranty.title: Warranties & Liability
items: The site is provided “as is” and “as available”. To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim implied warranties.
We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses. Our total liability for any claim is limited to the amount you paid for the product at issue.
Nothing in these Terms limits non-excludable consumer rights under applicable law.

law.label: Governing Law
law.title: Governing Law & Disputes
law.body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable in our principal place of business, without regard to conflict-of-laws rules. Disputes will be submitted to the competent courts there, without prejudice to mandatory consumer protections in your country.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these Terms? Reach out via <contact>Contact</contact> or email <email>myfootballworldstore@gmail.com</email>.

metadata.title: Shipping Policy — FootballWorld
metadata.description: FootballWorld Shipping Policy: processing times, carriers, rates, delivery estimates, tracking, customs/duties, failed deliveries, lost parcels, and contact.

hero.title: Shipping Policy
hero.description: Here’s how we process, ship, and track your order. If you need hands-on help, visit <shippingTracking>Shipping & Tracking</shippingTracking> for live tips and tools.

intro.label: Introduction
intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: We ship worldwide from our partner facilities. Processing times and transit times are estimates and may vary due to volume, customs, weather, and carrier performance.

processing.label: Processing Times
processing.title: Processing Times
items: Standard production: 2–5 business days for most items.
Personalized/custom products: usually 3–6 business days.
Orders placed on weekends or holidays begin processing next business day.

carriers.label: Carriers & Methods
carriers.title: Carriers & Methods
carriers.body: We use reliable postal and courier partners (varies by destination) to deliver safely and quickly. You’ll receive a shipping confirmation with a tracking link when your parcel leaves our facility.

rates.label: Rates & Free Shipping
rates.title: Rates & Free Shipping
items: Shipping rates are shown at checkout based on destination, weight, and method.
From time to time we may offer free-shipping promotions (see banner at the top of the site).
Any additional customs charges are separate from shipping fees collected at checkout.

estimates.label: Delivery Estimates
estimates.title: Delivery Estimates (after dispatch)
estimates.body: Typical transit ranges below. Remote areas may require extra time.
estimates.callout: Estimates exclude production/processing time. Customs inspections can extend delivery.

tracking.label: Tracking
tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.body: Use the link in your shipping email or head to <shippingTracking>Shipping & Tracking</shippingTracking> for carrier tools, troubleshooting, and status explanations.

address.label: Address Changes
address.title: Address Changes & Corrections
items: Contact us immediately if you entered the wrong address. We can only edit before the order ships.
Once in transit, address changes are rarely possible and may incur a re-shipping fee if the parcel returns to us.

customs.label: Customs & Duties
customs.title: Customs, Duties & Taxes
items: International orders may be subject to import duties, taxes, and fees collected by the destination country.
These charges are the recipient’s responsibility and are not included in our product or shipping prices (unless explicitly stated).
Customs processing can add time to the delivery window.

failed.label: Failed Delivery
failed.title: Failed Delivery / Returned to Sender
items: If delivery fails due to an incorrect address, unavailability, or non-collection, carriers may return the parcel.
We can reship once it returns (additional shipping costs may apply).
If you prefer a refund on return, shipping fees are non-refundable and personalized items are not eligible unless defective.

lost.label: Lost / Delayed Parcels
lost.title: Lost or Heavily Delayed Parcels
items: If your tracking hasn’t updated for several days, check our tips on the Shipping & Tracking page first.
Contact us if the parcel appears lost; we’ll open a trace with the carrier.
Resolutions may include replacement or refund depending on the investigation outcome and product type.

split.label: Split Shipments
split.title: Split Shipments
split.body: Orders with multiple items may ship separately to speed up delivery. You’ll receive separate tracking numbers where applicable.

preorders.label: Pre-orders
preorders.title: Pre-orders & Back-orders
preorders.body: Pre-order products ship once available. Estimated ship windows are shown on the product page and in your order confirmation. Your entire order may be held to ship together unless otherwise stated.

holidays.label: Holidays & Peak
holidays.title: Holidays & Peak Periods
holidays.body: During peak seasons (e.g., Black Friday, December holidays) production and carriers may experience delays. Please order early to allow extra time.

force.label: Force Majeure
force.title: Service Interruptions / Force Majeure
force.body: We are not liable for delays caused by events outside our control (e.g., severe weather, strikes, pandemic restrictions, customs closures). We always work with carriers to minimize impact and keep you informed.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Need help with shipping?
contact.body: Visit <shippingTracking>Shipping & Tracking</shippingTracking> for step-by-step fixes. Still stuck? <contactSupport>Contact Support</contactSupport> or email <email>myfootballworldstore@gmail.com</email>.

metadata.title: Return & Refund Policy — FootballWorld
metadata.description: How returns, exchanges and refunds work at FootballWorld: eligibility, timelines, non-returnable items, personalized products, costs, and how to start a return.

hero.title: Return & Refund Policy
hero.description: We want you to love your jersey. Below you’ll find how returns, exchanges, and refunds work. For a guided flow, use <returns>Returns & Exchanges</returns>.

intro.label: Introduction
intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: This policy applies to purchases made directly on <brand>FootballWorld</brand>. If you bought from a third-party marketplace, please refer to their return rules. Your statutory rights remain unaffected where applicable.

window.label: Return Window
window.title: Return window
items: You can request a return or exchange within 14 days of delivery.
The window counts from the day tracking marks the parcel as delivered.
For holiday gifts, we may extend the window—check our seasonal notice or contact support.
window.callout: Tip: Start your return as soon as you decide. Faster initiation = faster resolution.

condition.label: Item Condition
condition.title: Item condition requirements
items: Unworn, unwashed, and in original condition.
All tags, hygiene seals, and packaging intact.
No smells (e.g., perfume, smoke) or signs of wear/use.
Include any freebies/gifts that came with the order.
condition.callout: Items returned in non-resellable condition may be refused or incur a partial refund.

nonreturn.label: Non-returnable Items
nonreturn.title: Non-returnable items
items: Final-sale items clearly marked as non-returnable.
Gift cards and downloadable products.
Used or washed items.

personalized.label: Personalized Items
personalized.title: Personalized / Custom products
items: Customized jerseys (e.g., printed name/number, badges) are non-returnable and non-refundable, except if defective or we made a mistake.
Please double-check spelling, numbers, and sizing before ordering.
personalized.callout: If a personalized item arrives damaged or incorrect, we will repair, replace, or refund according to the issue—contact us right away with photos.

start.label: Start a Return
start.title: How to start a return
items: Go to the dedicated page: <returns>Returns & Exchanges</returns>.
Use your order number and email to request a label or instructions.
Pack items securely; include your order slip or a note with name, email, and order number.

exchanges.label: Exchanges
exchanges.title: Exchanges (size / variant)
items: Exchanges depend on availability. If the requested size/variant is out of stock, we’ll offer alternatives or a refund.
We typically ship the replacement after receiving and checking your return, unless otherwise arranged.

refunds.label: Refunds & Timing
refunds.title: Refund method & timing
items: Refunds are issued to the original payment method unless agreed otherwise.
Once your return is inspected and approved, we process refunds within 2–5 business days.
Your bank/card issuer may take additional time to post the credit (up to 10 business days).
Original shipping fees are non-refundable unless the item was defective or we made an error.

costs.label: Return Shipping Costs
costs.title: Return shipping costs & responsibility
items: Return postage is generally the customer’s responsibility, unless the item is defective or incorrect.
If we provide a prepaid label, we may deduct its cost from the refund unless the return is due to our error.
We recommend a tracked service; lost return parcels without proof of posting cannot be refunded.

defective.label: Defective / Wrong Item
defective.title: Defective, damaged, or wrong item received
items: Inspect your order upon arrival. If there’s an issue, contact us within 7 days.
Include clear photos and a short description of the problem.
We will repair, replace, or refund depending on the case and stock availability.
defective.callout: Keep all packaging until we confirm next steps. Carriers may require evidence for a claim.

gifts.label: Gifts
gifts.title: Gifts
items: If the item was marked as a gift and shipped directly to you, you may receive store credit for the value of your return once processed.
If the order wasn’t marked as a gift, the refund goes to the original purchaser.

promos.label: Bundles / Discounts
promos.title: Bundles, promotions & partial returns
items: For bundle/BOGO deals, returning part of the bundle may adjust the discount.
Free gifts must be returned if they were part of a promotion tied to the returned item.

contact.label: Need Help?
contact.title: Questions or special cases?
contact.body: Our team is happy to help with sizing issues, damaged parcels, or unique situations. Use <returns>Returns & Exchanges</returns> or <contact>Contact Support</contact>. You can also email <email>myfootballworldstore@gmail.com</email>.

metadata.title: About Us — FootballWorld
metadata.description: Learn who we are, how we craft concept and authentic football jerseys, and what we stand for at FootballWorld.

hero.title: About FootballWorld
hero.description: We’re a design-first studio crafting <authentic>authentic</authentic> and <concept>concept</concept> football jerseys. Made-to-order quality, fair pricing, and reliable worldwide shipping, so you can wear the game your way.

make.title: What we make
make.description: From elite club classics to bold concept drops, every jersey is built with premium fabrics, pro-level stitching and vibrant color accuracy. Personalization? Absolutely — names, numbers and badges in club-correct styles.
items: Authentic jerseys
Concept jerseys
Name and number personalization

build.title: How we build
build.description: Our studio combines <design>design</design> and <craft>craft</craft>. Patterns are cut with precision, panels are stitched for movement, and prints are applied using durable techniques — all made to order to reduce waste.

items.title: Quality first
items.desc: Materials, fit and finish that feel great on and off the pitch.

items.title: Customer care
items.desc: Helpful, human support with 24–48h average reply times.

items.title: Fair pricing
items.desc: Direct-to-fan model keeps prices honest and transparent.

items.title: Design culture
items.desc: Original concepts with bold aesthetics and club lore.

sustainability.title: Sustainability, thoughtfully
sustainability.description: We operate mostly on a <madeToOrder>made-to-order</madeToOrder> basis, which helps avoid overstock and reduces waste. We’re continually refining our packaging and production partners to minimize impact.
items: Reduced overproduction
Global carriers with consolidated routes
Durable prints and long wear

items.title: January 2026 Kick-Off
items.desc: FootBallWorld officially launches, offering football fans the best of both worlds: official football shirts and exclusive concept kits designed by us.

items.title: The First Products Arrive
items.desc: Our very first shirts became available online, a mix of official football shirts and creative concept kits, made for true fans.

items.title: Today — Built for the Fans
items.desc: From day one, FootBallWorld was made for football lovers who want something different, whether it’s a shirt they know or a design they’ve never seen before.

items.title: Future — More to Come
items.desc: This is only the beginning. New products, fresh concept kits, and more ways to celebrate football are on the horizon.

cta.title: Ready to find your next jersey?
cta.description: Browse products or reach our support team — we’re happy to help.

footer.copyright: © {year} FootballWorld — Built by fans, for fans.

summary.freeItemsApplied: Free items applied: <count></count> (always the cheapest ones).

ptStockPage.title: Portugal Stock Jerseys

intro.line1: On this page you can only buy products that <brand>FootballWorld already has in stock in Portugal</brand>, delivered with CTT in <delivery>2–3 business days</delivery>.
intro.line2: The promotions used on other pages <noApply>do not apply</noApply> to the products on this page. Instead, this page uses a special Portugal stock shipping promotion:
intro.line3: <one>1 jersey:</one> 6€ shipping • <two>2 jerseys:</two> 3€ shipping • <three>3 or more jerseys:</three> FREE shipping
intro.whyTitle: Why are Portugal stock products cheaper?
intro.whyLine1: Because these products are already stored in Portugal, we avoid international shipping costs, import fees, and extra supplier margins.
intro.whyLine2: This allows us to offer better prices and faster delivery within Portugal while keeping the same product quality.

ptStockPage.empty: No Portugal stock products available yet.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.availableOnly: Only available sizes can be shipped immediately.

ctt.title: Delivered with CTT
ctt.description: This product is already in stock in Portugal and is shipped via <ctt>CTT</ctt>, with fast local delivery.

description.title: Description
description.fallback: No description available for this product.
